description: Comfort and style rolled into one - that's playboy for you. Revel in the comfort of flip flops with this summery pair from Playboy. Upper Rubber thong straps that are smooth on the inside for absolute comfort Textured on the upper with brand badge Toe separator to hold the foot in place Soft, cushioned rubber footbed with happy brand logo print for all-day comfort Oustole Single piece flexible and cushioned rubber footbed and outsole for all-day comfort Brand bunny face logo-styled lugs throughout the footbed for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces slipper care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
